metadata.description: Unlock the web for Claude Code — anti-bot access, desktop/mobile screenshots, video download + transcription, logged-in browsing, reference-image search.

plugins.name: surf
plugins.description: Access any website and unlock the web: read anti-bot pages, see images, watch/download/transcribe videos, extract structured data, drive pages logged-in. Routes across Cloudflare Browser Run, the Claude-in-Chrome extension, and local Playwright.
